approval_boundaries.plan: approval of the exact immutable plan identity
approval_boundaries.repository-effects: approval to apply the plan's named repository effects
approval_boundaries.network-access: approval for the named endpoint, data, and purpose
approval_boundaries.tool-installation: approval for the named tool identity, source, authority, and effects
approval_boundaries.data-handling: authorization for named content to enter a named tool, service, or environment
approval_boundaries.authority-change: approval to grant or broaden a named actor or integration authority

rules: conversation, prior approval, plan approval, or one effect approval never implies another boundary
every approval records actor, scope, identity, purpose, effects, and applicable expiry
changed plan, effect, endpoint, data class, tool identity, or authority invalidates the affected approval
